title: Fix viewer shrink on browser zoom
description:
PDF Viewer no longer shrinks in a loop when changing browser zoom (90–100%). Fit now measures from stable shell width, scroll/body use 100% width instead of shrinking pixel widths, and ResizeObserver is debounced with a fit lock.

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg77).
changeLog: Stable shell-based column width for fit (breaks shrink feedback loop).
Viewer scroll/body width 100% — no pixel shrink on each refit.
Panel CSS flex:1 so viewer panel does not shrink-wrap to content.
Debounced ResizeObserver + fit lock on browser zoom resize.
